intro: This archive covers 17 articles from April 12–20, 2026, focused on Patch Tuesday updates. The most prominent vulnerabilities addressed include the critical CVE-2026-27681 (CVSS 9.9) and CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8), alongside CVE-2025-27080 and CVE-2025-27088. The updates targeted a severity mix of 7 critical, 6 high, and 4 medium flaws. These patches were crucial for sectors such as critical infrastructure, education, energy, enterprise, and government, with a global scope of affected regions.
